_meta.description:
Solution-level integration umbrella — split into Internal Modules and
Externally-Integrated Modules per IMDA's User Discovery V2 template.
Each sub-section has its own Mandatory Y/N gate; vendor commits to all
caps within a sub-section with one Y/N.
_meta.source:
IMDA "User Discovery — Overall Integration Requirements V2" template
(provided by user 2026-06-03). 6 mandatory caps total (3 per sub-
section). All tier=mandatory per the IMDA "Importance" column.
_meta.ships_when:
Caps populated 2026-06-03. Sub-section split applied 2026-06-03 (was
a single combined umbrella before). Excel export wiring + DraftsContext
editor support still pending — see TASKS.md.

sub_sections.title: Internal Modules
sub_sections.subtitle: Vendor's Own Modules / Software
sub_sections.umbrella_question: Does your solution provide robust data integration across all ERP modules within your own application, ensuring a seamless and consistent information flow across all business functions without manual intervention?

caps.name: ERP Interoperability (Internal)
caps.description:
Your solution provides data integration for all ERP modules within
your own application, ensuring a seamless and consistent
information flow across all business functions without manual
intervention.

caps.name: User Documentation (Internal)
caps.description:
Your solution provides documentation for all inter-module
workflows within your application, for ease of referencing and
troubleshooting.

caps.name: Audit Logging and Monitoring
caps.description:
Your solution provides a dashboard to track data health and
transmission status across internal modules, and automatically
captures logs of any errors encountered (such as user-facing
error messages and error-tracking dashboards).

sub_sections.title: Externally-Integrated Modules
sub_sections.subtitle: Third-Party Software, Integrated at the Customer's Request
sub_sections.umbrella_question: Does your solution provide robust data integration with any externally-integrated third-party ERP modules (integrated at the customer's request), ensuring a seamless and consistent information flow across all business functions without manual intervention?

caps.name: ERP Interoperability (Integration)
caps.description:
Your solution provides data integration with all externally-
integrated ERP modules (third-party systems integrated at the
customer's request), ensuring a seamless and consistent
information flow across all business functions without manual
intervention.

caps.name: User Documentation (Integration)
caps.description:
Your solution documents all integrated data fields exchanged
with third-party modules, for ease of reference and
troubleshooting.

caps.name: Audit Logging and Monitoring
caps.description:
Your solution provides a dashboard to track connection health
and data transmission status across third-party integrations,
and automatically captures logs of any errors encountered.
